From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

**[World music](/wiki/World_music "World music")** is an English phrase for styles of music from non-Western countries.

**World Music** may refer to:

* ["World music" (term)](/wiki/World_music_(term) "World music (term)"), credited to ethnomusicologist Robert E. Brown
* [*World Music* (Goat album)](/wiki/World_Music_(Goat_album) "World Music (Goat album)"), 2012
* [*World Music* (Taj Mahal album)](/wiki/World_Music_(Taj_Mahal_album) "World Music (Taj Mahal album)"), 1993

## See also

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=World_Music_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: See also")]

* [World of Music (disambiguation)](/wiki/World_of_Music_(disambiguation) "World of Music (disambiguation)")
* *[Fête de la Musique](/wiki/F%C3%AAte_de_la_Musique "Fête de la Musique")*, or World Music Day, on June 21 every year
* [Awards for world music](/wiki/Awards_for_world_music "Awards for world music")
* [Putumayo World Music](/wiki/Putumayo_World_Music "Putumayo World Music"), an American record label
